title: Player Health Indicators (ANIMATED)
description: Renders a player health indicator HP bar with dynamic animations above players' heads.
body:
# Health Indicators Renders player health above their heads --- *Health bar is also animated responsively just like a player's client-side status bar!* Has smooth-looking in-game config menu! **THE KEYBIND IS MINUS `-` !!**
This mod requires [ImproperUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/ImproperUI) to run. ``` Like your vanilla health bar, the display flashes upon being updated. The hearts also shake when the player are below 4 health points. ``` Supported heart types include: - withered - poisened - frozen - hardcoare - abosorption - normal Also like vanilla, the hearts would stack up high if the player has more than 1 row of hearts. Vanilla animation and effects were added as much as possible: - update blinking - last damage flashing - heart regeneration wave animation - heart texture types - heart stacking - absorption **DISCLAIMERS (2):** - **Health Indicators may be banned on some servers, please check their rules first!** - **Most servers have anti-hp-indicator plugins, meaning that this mod would not work properly on those servers!**
Settings: - Enabled: toggles the rendering - No NPC: disallows NPC players from rendering their health bar - Show Own: shows your own health bar - Scale: scale of the health bar - Offset Y: the y-position of the health bar

![https://github.com/ItziSpyder/health-indicators/raw/main/assets/demo.png](https://github.com/ItziSpyder/health-indicators/raw/main/assets/demo.png) ![https://github.com/ItziSpyder/health-indicators/raw/main/assets/menu.png](https://github.com/ItziSpyder/health-indicators/raw/main/assets/menu.png)
